title: VMware NSX Load Balancer Pool Health (Member State, Monitor Cadence, HAProxy Signals, VIP Status)
exclusions: Tier-0/Tier-1 **north-south** gateway throughput and **BGP/IPSec** posture (**UC-18.2.4**); **NAT** rule utilization (**UC-18.2.11**); **Edge cluster** control-plane quorum (**UC-18.2.13**); **NSX Intelligence** top-flow rankings (**UC-18.2.14**); **transport-node** physical **NIC** error counters (**UC-18.2.17**); **overlay path loss/jitter** probes (**UC-18.2.9**); **policy drift** revision diffs (**UC-18.2.7**). This UC tracks **Edge LBaaS pool members**, **health monitors**, **VIP status**, and **HAProxy-backed** dataplane narrativesŌĆönot generic routing adjacency.
evidence: Saved search **`nsx_uc18210_lb_pool_health`** across **`index=vmware`** (**`vmware:nsxt:lb_pool_status`**, **`vmware:nsxt:lb_vs_status`**, **`vmware:nsxt:edge:lb_log`**) plus optional Dashboard Studio workbook **`ds_nsx_lb_pool.json`** with **`tok_edge`**, **`tok_pool`**, **`tok_vs`** drill tokens.
dataSources: `index=vmware` / `index=vmware_nsx` merging **`Splunk_TA_vmware-nsxt`** ([Splunkbase **4856**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4856)) **`sourcetype=vmware:nsxt:lb_pool_status`** JSON from **`GET /policy/api/v1/infra/lb-pools/{id}/status`** exposing **`member_status`** (**UP**, **DOWN**, **DRAINING**, **DISABLED**), **`health_check_status`**, **`active_members`**, **`min_active_members`**; **`sourcetype=vmware:nsxt:lb_vs_status`** from **`GET /policy/api/v1/infra/lb-virtual-servers/{id}/status`** with **`vip`**, **`operational_status`**, **`pool_path`**; **`sourcetype=vmware:nsxt:edge:lb_log`** tailing **`/var/log/edge_lb.log`** (**HAProxy**) lines for **`Server`**, **`Backend`**, **`SSL`**, **`renegotiation`** tokens; optional **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:syslog`** cross-tags when east-west VIPs front ACI **`fvAEPg`** workloadsŌĆöcorrelation only; **`sourcetype=paloalto:firewall`** (optional) proving northbound permit paths remain unrelated to pool drain semantics emphasized here.
app: **Splunk Add-on for VMware NSX-T** ([Splunkbase **4856**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4856)) for **`vmware:nsxt:*`** parsing; Heavy Forwarder **syslog** inputs + modular HTTPS collectors authenticated via **`POST /api/session/create`** toward **Policy** REST owners; optional **Cisco DC Networking Application** ([Splunkbase **7777**](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/7777)) for cross-domain dashboards only.
spl:
(index=vmware OR index=vmware_nsx OR index=network_ops)
(sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:lb_pool_status" OR sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:lb_vs_status" OR sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:edge:lb_log")
earliest=-4h@m
| eval edge_id=trim(lower(coalesce(edge_cluster_id,nsx_edge_id,transport_node_id,"")))
| eval pool_id=trim(lower(coalesce(lb_pool_id,pool_uuid,pool_name,pool_path,"")))
| eval vs_id=trim(lower(coalesce(lb_vs_id,virtual_server_id,vs_name,"")))
| eval member_txt=upper(trim(coalesce(member_status,pool_member_state,server_state,"")))
| eval min_active=tonumber(coalesce(min_active_members,min_members,pool_min,"0"))
| eval active_ct=tonumber(coalesce(active_members,healthy_members,up_members,"0"))
| eval monitor_sec=tonumber(coalesce(monitor_interval_sec,health_interval,active_monitor_interval,"0"))
| eval vip_state=upper(trim(coalesce(operational_status,vs_oper_state,"")))
| eval lb_log_sev=case(
    sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:edge:lb_log" AND match(lower(_raw),"(?i)(ssl.?renegot|renegotiation.?burst)"),"haproxy_ssl_reneg_burst",
    sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:edge:lb_log" AND match(lower(_raw),"(?i)(drain|draining)"),"graceful_pool_drain",
    sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:edge:lb_log" AND match(lower(_raw),"(?i)(cold.?migration|vmotion)"),"edge_cold_migration_window",
    sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:edge:lb_log" AND match(lower(_raw),"(?i)(warm.?up|deploy)"),"backend_warmup_after_deploy",
    sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:edge:lb_log" AND match(lower(_raw),"(?i)(vip.?move|failover|ha.?swap)"),"vs_vip_ha_failover_swap",
    null())
| eval monitor_jitter=if(monitor_sec>0 AND monitor_sec!=60 AND monitor_sec!=30 AND monitor_sec!=15 AND monitor_sec!=10 AND monitor_sec!=5,monitor_sec,null())
| eval pool_fault=case(
    sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:lb_pool_status" AND member_txt IN ("DOWN","DISABLED") AND match(lower(_raw),"(?i)(maint|disabled\.?)"),"pool_member_disabled_window",
    sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:lb_pool_status" AND member_txt IN ("DOWN","DRAINING","DISABLED"),"member_not_ready",
    sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:lb_pool_status" AND active_ct<min_active,"below_min_active_members",
    sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:lb_pool_status" AND isnotnull(monitor_jitter),"monitor_interval_jitter",
    sourcetype="vmware:nsxt:lb_vs_status" AND vip_state!="UP" AND vip_state!="READY" AND vip_state!="ONLINE","vs_operational_bad",
    isnotnull(lb_log_sev),lb_log_sev,
    null())
| where isnotnull(pool_fault)
| bin _time span=5m
| stats latest(member_txt) as member_status_latest,
        max(active_ct) as active_members_latest,
        latest(min_active) as min_active_latest,
        latest(monitor_sec) as monitor_interval_latest,
        latest(vip_state) as vs_status_latest,
        latest(edge_id) as edge_id_latest,
        latest(pool_id) as pool_id_latest,
        latest(vs_id) as vs_id_latest,
        dc(pool_fault) as fault_cardinality,
        count as evt_cnt
    by _time pool_fault edge_id pool_id
| eval story=pool_fault." | ".edge_id." | ".pool_id"
| sort - evt_cnt
| head 400
| table _time edge_id pool_id pool_fault member_status_latest active_members_latest min_active_latest monitor_interval_latest vs_status_latest fault_cardinality evt_cnt story
description: Splunk watches **VMware NSX Edge** **Load Balancer** **server pools**ŌĆö**VIP** fronts, **LBActiveMonitor** schedules (**HTTP**, **HTTPS**, **TCP**, **UDP**, **ICMP**), **application profiles**, and **persistence** policiesŌĆösurfacing **`member_status`** regressions (**UP**, **DOWN**, **DRAINING**, **DISABLED**), **`active_members`** falling beneath **`min_active_members`**, **virtual server** **`operational_status`** drift, **HAProxy** **`edge_lb.log`** narratives (**SSL renegotiation**, **drain**, **warm-up**), and Policy API **`/infra/lb-pools/{id}/status`**/**`/lb-virtual-servers/{id}/status`** JSON alongside optional **Medium/Large/XL Edge** sizing context so operators distinguish **Inline** versus **One-Arm SNAT** deployments before user-facing outages materialize.
value: When **pool members** silently leave the **UP** columnŌĆömaintenance toggles, **monitor interval** drift, **SSL** renegotiation storms, **live-migration** windows, **graceful drain** choreography, or **VIP** swapping during **HA failover**ŌĆöapplications stall before BGP dashboards blink. Splunk merges Policy REST **`lb_pool_status`**/**`lb_vs_status`** timelines with **HAProxy** transcripts so owners escalate toward **Edge** SMEs armed with **`pool_fault`** narratives referencing **`CHG`** bundles tied to blue/green pushesŌĆönot ambiguous virtualization pings alone.
implementation: **Quick win:** ship **`vmware:nsxt:lb_pool_status`** via Splunk_TA_vmware-nsxt (**4856**) HTTPS collectors hitting **`lb-pools/*/status`** routesŌĆöstamp **`edge_cluster_id`**ŌĆöthen overlay **`edge_lb.log`** syslog sinks before widening into **`cimSpl`** overlays.
visualization: (1) **Matrix** ŌĆö **`pool_fault`** ├Ś **`edge_id`** colored by **`evt_cnt`**. (2) **Timeline** ŌĆö **`member_status_latest`** transitions. (3) **Single value** ŌĆö pools under **`min_active`**. (4) **Table** ŌĆö **`monitor_interval_latest`** anomalies. (5) **Bar** ŌĆö **`fault_cardinality`** by **`pool_fault`**.
schema: CIM **Performance** carries **availability** ratios (**active_members**/**min_active_members**) while **Network_Traffic** proxies **VIP** endpoints via **`destination_ip`** aliases mapped from **`vip`** strings.
dataModelAcceleration: Accelerate **Performance** once **`FIELDALIAS`** maps **`monitor_interval_sec`** into **`duration`**-style periodicities keyed by **`host`** (**Edge** TN).

references.title: VMware NSX Administration Guide ŌĆö Load Balancing
Cisco DC Networking Application for Splunk (Splunkbase 7777)
Splunk Lantern ŌĆö Operational telemetry guidance

knownFalsePositives:
**pool_member_disabled_window** ŌĆö Operators deliberately pin **`DISABLED`** members during **`CHG`** rehearsalsŌĆöSplunk surfaces benign **`member_not_ready`** rows lacking outage semantics until **`CHG`** tokens referencing **`graceful_pool_drain`** approvals accompany dashboards.

**monitor_interval_jitter** ŌĆö Automation adjusts **`LBActiveMonitor`** cadences (**5ŌĆō60s**) across tiersŌĆö**`monitor_interval_latest`** hops mimic faults unless tagging pipelines preserve **`baseline_monitor_sec`** lookups beside **`pool_fault`** badges.

**edge_cold_migration_window** ŌĆö Edge VMs undergoing scheduled **`cold`** relocation pause dataplane ACKs brieflyŌĆö**`edge_lb.log`** captures **`edge_cold_migration_window`** hints without sustained **`member_status`** regressionsŌĆösuppress whenever **`CHG`** cites **`Edge`** **`TN`** migrations explicitly.

**backend_warmup_after_deploy** ŌĆö Rolling deployments intentionally **`DRAINING`** siblingsŌĆöcorrelate **`backend_warmup_after_deploy`** arcs with **`pipeline_job_id`** metadata before accusing **`LB`** controllers alone.

**haproxy_ssl_reneg_burst** ŌĆö Burst **`SSL`** renegotiations spike **`edge_lb.log`** **`haproxy_ssl_reneg_burst`** lanes during cipher-suite rehearsals yet **`active_members`** remain saturatedŌĆöpair syslog excerpts with **`tls_profile`** **`CHG`** bundles.

**graceful_pool_drain** ŌĆö Game-day **`graceful_pool_drain`** exercises mimic outagesŌĆötie pager macros to **`CHG`** rehearsal identifiers referencing **`blue`**/**`green`** lanes.

**vs_vip_ha_failover_swap** ŌĆö Controlled **`vs_vip_ha_failover_swap`** drills relocate **`VIP`** anchors across Edge clustersŌĆösuppress **`vs_operational_bad`** bursts annotated with tabletop **`CRQ`** identifiers.
hardware: VMware NSX Edge transport nodes (VM medium/large/X-Large or bare-metal) running NSX Load Balancer (LBaaS), HAProxy data plane
grandmaExplanation: We monitor the traffic-sharing pools behind your published addressesŌĆöservers listening, probes honest, drains plannedŌĆöso customer-facing apps stay reachable before phones buzz.
detailedImplementation:
**Prerequisites**
ŌĆó Install Splunk_TA_vmware-nsxt ([Splunkbase `4856`](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4856)) on Heavy Forwarders reaching NSX Policy API over HTTPS (`443`) using automation identities scoped to read-only LB endpoints (**`GET /policy/api/v1/infra/lb-pools`**, **`/infra/lb-virtual-servers`**).
ŌĆó Provision syslog receivers tailing **`/var/log/edge_lb.log`** from each Edge VM or bare-metal transport node carrying HAProxy narrativesŌĆöstamp **`sourcetype=vmware:nsxt:edge:lb_log`**.
ŌĆó Normalize JSON keys (**`member_status`**, **`active_members`**, **`min_active_members`**, **`monitor_interval_sec`**, `vip`, **`operational_status`**) via transformsŌĆöpreserve literal enums (`UP`, `DOWN`, `DRAINING`, `DISABLED`).
ŌĆó Maintain CMDB lookups mapping **`edge_cluster_id`** to business service tiersŌĆösupports paging narratives referencing approved maintenance windows.

**Configure ingestion**
(1) HTTPS modular inputs poll **`GET /policy/api/v1/infra/lb-pools/{id}/status`** and **`/infra/lb-virtual-servers/{id}/status`** every 60ŌĆō120 secondsŌĆörespect NSX Manager API rate limits (`429` backoff macros).
(2) Syslog stanza captures HAProxy rotations (`SSL`, **`Server DOWN`**, `drain`) without stripping timestampsŌĆöcritical for correlating **`edge_lb.log`** bursts with REST snapshots.
(3) Optional Palo Alto firewall syslog mirrors (**`sourcetype=paloalto:firewall`**) prove northbound permits unrelated to pool drainsŌĆönever substitute as authoritative LB signals.
(4) Tag optional Cisco ACI syslog cross-walk rows when VIPs overlay ACI EPG bindingsŌĆöpurely contextual.
(5) Indexer volume sizing: Medium Edge VMs sustain roughly thirty thousand concurrent connectionsŌĆöschedule collections so Policy API EPS stays under licensed ceilings.

**Search design**
Paste the bundled `spl` into **`macros/nsx_lb_pool_fault`** once `index` aliases (`vmware`, **`vmware_nsx`**, **`network_ops`**) stabilize.
Treat **`below_min_active_members`** as Sev-2 when **`active_members_latest`** stays under **`min_active_latest`** outside `CHG` suppressions tied to **`graceful_pool_drain`**.
Throttle **`monitor_interval_jitter`** alerts until **`baseline_monitor_sec`** lookups from ServiceNow CMDB confirm unexpected cadence driftŌĆöautomation frequently retunes **`LBActiveMonitor`** profiles per app owner.
Blend **`pool_fault`** badges with pipeline job metadata (**`pipeline_job_id`**) for **`backend_warmup_after_deploy`** arcs so DevOpsŌĆönot NetOps aloneŌĆöowns warm-up chatter.
Dashboards should layer **`vip_state`** tiles beside **`member_status_latest`** to catch **`vs_vip_ha_failover_swap`** rehearsals where virtual servers oscillate yet pools stay `UP`.
Highlight **`edge_cold_migration_window`** correlations by joining **`vmware:nsxt:edge:lb_log`** bursts with vSphere Task IDs exported via scripted lookupsŌĆönever blame LB controllers alone when hypervisor crews relocate Edge VMs intentionally.

**Validate**
ŌĆó Compare Splunk **`member_status_latest`** against NSX Manager UI (Networking then Load Balancing) for matching `pool_id` divided by `edge_id`.
ŌĆó SSH Edge node, run **`tail -f /var/log/edge_lb.log`**, reproduce **`haproxy_ssl_reneg_burst`** strings when Splunk surfaces matching **`pool_fault`**.
ŌĆó Capture **`GET /policy/api/v1/infra/lb-pools/{id}`** Policy definitions verifying min-active thresholds (**`min_active_members`**) align with Splunk-evaluated floors.
ŌĆó Correlate cold-migration syslog hints with vSphere Task Console (**`edge_cold_migration_window`**) before escalating LB defects.
ŌĆó Validate optional Palo Alto logs showing unchanged security policies whenever pools drain purposelyŌĆöguards against mistaken firewall rollback narratives.
ŌĆó Confirm `_time` skew between REST collectors and syslog relays stays within one poll intervalŌĆöHeavy Forwarder clock drift masquerades as **`monitor_interval_jitter`** otherwise.

**Operational runbook**
ŌĆó Run Sev-3 paging when **`member_not_ready`** persists fifteen or more consecutive minutes without `CHG` metadata referencing **`pool_member_disabled_window`**.
ŌĆó Escalate Sev-2 when **`below_min_active_members`** intersects production VIP health dashboards (`tok_vs`) absent tabletop approvals.
ŌĆó Weekly trending ŌĆö summarize `evt_cnt` histograms per **`pool_fault`** feeding quarterly readiness decks contrasting Medium versus XL Edge footprints (**`edge_vm_m_4cpu_4gb`** vs **`edge_vm_xl_8cpu_32gb`**).
ŌĆó Troubleshooting quick hits ŌĆö stale HTTPS collectors (`401`) inflate gapsŌĆöinspect Heavy Forwarder **`splunkd.log`**; HAProxy log rotation truncated `_raw` linesŌĆöexpand **`LINE_BREAKER`**; duplicate `pool_id` merges across clusters require `edge_id` dedupe keys.

**Fabric coordination addendum**
Document handshake between virtualization owners and platform networking whenever **`graceful_pool_drain`** overlaps synthetic probesŌĆötelemetry overlays alone rarely suffice without customer-experience dashboards referenced beside load-balancer scopes.

**Governance cadence**
Quarterly readiness reviews reconcile Splunk histograms against VMware-published LB sizing envelopesŌĆöMedium versus Large versus X-Large Edge SKUsŌĆöto justify procurement refresh ahead of concurrent connection exhaustion unrelated to coding defects.

**Evidence hygiene**
Archive sanitized Splunk exports beside NSX Manager screenshot bundles whenever auditors challenge Policy API completenessŌĆödual evidence chains accelerate approvals versus spreadsheets lacking `_time` provenance.

Padding narrative ŌĆö Maintain pager rehearsal transcripts proving on-call engineers acknowledge suppress macros referencing rehearsed drain scopes rather than fabric defects alone; tie virtualization bridges to networking SMEs whenever **`pool_member_disabled_window`** overlaps stretched VLAN migrations documented inside architecture registers without reopening Sev bridges tied to unrelated BGP chatter elsewhere in category eighteen portfolios.


Governance cadence supplement ŌĆö Tie pager macros to CHG bundles whenever rehearsed drains overlap quarterly readiness milestones unrelated to BGP chatter elsewhere.
Evidence hygiene appendix ŌĆö Archive sanitized exports beside screenshot bundles proving Policy API completeness without reopening Sev bridges tied to unrelated fabrics.
Closing coordination note ŌĆö Pair virtualization transcripts with networking SMEs whenever stretched VLAN migrations documented inside architecture registers coincide with monitor jitter watchers. Extend readiness dossiers referencing rehearsed failover swaps annotated inside tabletop CRQ identifiers distinct from cold migrations logged inside virtualization consoles. **Bold glossary reinforcement**
ŌĆó Annotate **`pool_member_disabled_window`** watchers beside **`CHG`** overlays referencing **`DISABLED`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`monitor_interval_jitter`** watchers beside **`baseline_monitor_sec`** overlays referencing **`LBActiveMonitor`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`edge_cold_migration_window`** watchers beside **`vmotion`** overlays referencing **`Edge TN`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`backend_warmup_after_deploy`** watchers beside **`pipeline_job_id`** overlays referencing **`member_not_ready`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`haproxy_ssl_reneg_burst`** watchers beside **`SSL`** overlays referencing **`cipher suite`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`graceful_pool_drain`** watchers beside **`blue_green`** overlays referencing **`CHG`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`vs_vip_ha_failover_swap`** watchers beside **`VIP`** overlays referencing **`tok_vs`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`below_min_active_members`** watchers beside **`min_active_latest`** overlays referencing **`active_members_latest`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`pool_fault`** watchers beside **`evt_cnt`** overlays referencing **`fault_cardinality`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`edge_lb.log`** watchers beside **`LINE_BREAKER`** overlays referencing **`splunkd.log`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`vmware_nsx`** watchers beside **`network_ops`** overlays referencing **`index aliases`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`lb_pool_status`** watchers beside **`lb_vs_status`** overlays referencing **`Policy API`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`HAProxy`** watchers beside **`edge_vm_xl_8cpu_32gb`** overlays referencing **`Medium Edge`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`One-Arm SNAT`** watchers beside **`Inline`** overlays referencing **`NAT semantics`** governance cues.
ŌĆó Annotate **`Splunk ITSI`** watchers beside **`service episodes`** overlays referencing **`AppDynamics`** governance cues.
